title: Model Router Configuration
description: Configuration for the Claude model router hook. Accepts either the legacy v1 tier shape or the v2 class-based shape (discriminated by "version": 2).

v1Config.description: Legacy v1 shape: keyword/pattern tiers plus word-count thresholds. Has no "version" key.

$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file for IDE validation and autocomplete.

opus.description: Configuration for opus-tier routing. Uses keyword matching and regex patterns.

sonnet.description: Configuration for sonnet-tier routing. Uses regex patterns.

haiku.description: Configuration for haiku-tier routing. Uses regex patterns. Only matches when prompt word count is below haiku_max_word_count threshold.

thresholds.description: Word-count thresholds that influence tier selection.

opus_word_count.description: Prompts longer than this word count are routed to opus.

opus_question_word_count.description: Prompts containing '?' and longer than this word count are routed to opus.

haiku_max_word_count.description: Haiku patterns only match if the prompt is shorter than this word count.

mode.description: "extend" merges with built-in defaults; "replace" discards defaults entirely.

keywords.description: Plain-text keywords to match against the prompt (case-insensitive).

patterns.description: Regex patterns to match against the prompt.

remove_keywords.description: Keywords to remove from the defaults (only used in "extend" mode).

remove_patterns.description: Patterns to remove from the defaults (only used in "extend" mode).

v2Config.description: v2 shape: class-based routing with model+effort targets. Requires "version": 2.

$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file for IDE validation and autocomplete.

version.description: Schema version discriminator. Must be 2 for the v2 shape.

apply_mode.description: "warn" suggests a model change; "autoswitch" writes the default model for new sessions.

allow_fable_autoswitch.description: Allow the router to autoswitch/inject the fable model. When false, fable decisions behave like warn.

subagent_enforcement.description: "on" rewrites/injects subagent models; "advisory" emits a systemMessage only; "off" disables.

cli_fallback.description: Enable the CLI classifier fallback. When false, routing is heuristics-only and fully offline.

cli_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout in seconds for the CLI classifier subprocess.

cache_max_entries.description: Maximum number of cached classifier decisions before oldest entries are evicted.

thresholds.description: Scoring margins and word-count thresholds that influence class/tier selection.

confident_margin.description: Score margin above which a class decision is treated as confident.

downroute_margin.description: Score margin required to downroute below the caller's model.

effort_warn_distance.description: Effort-level distance at which an effort warning is emitted.

mechanical_max_words.description: Mechanical-class patterns only match if the prompt is shorter than this word count (from v1 haiku_max_word_count).

long_prompt_words.description: Prompts longer than this word count are escalated (from v1 opus_word_count).

question_words.description: Prompts containing '?' and longer than this word count are escalated (from v1 opus_question_word_count).

classes.description: Per-class routing configuration keyed by class name (mechanical, implementation, debugging, architecture, extreme, or custom).

capability_gates.description: Patterns that gate up to a minimum tier (sonnet).

effort_floors.description: Patterns that raise the effort floor (implies a minimum tier of sonnet).

floor.description: Effort level enforced as the floor for matching prompts.

mode.description: "extend" merges with built-in defaults; "replace" discards defaults entirely.

keywords.description: Plain-text keywords to match against the prompt (case-insensitive).

patterns.description: Regex patterns to match against the prompt.

remove_keywords.description: Keywords to remove from the defaults (only used in "extend" mode).

remove_patterns.description: Patterns to remove from the defaults (only used in "extend" mode).

model.description: Model alias to route this class to.

effort.description: Effort level for this class. Omitted for the mechanical/haiku target.
